subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-08-04 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: Last Friday I went to the Mosque of Sidi Jahar. There were many Mullahs. One of them started to pray while another began to chant the verses of the Koran.
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @Islamic rituals; holy days; practices; etc., @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
